description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular form. The exterior features a combination of light beige and tan wall finishes, with large windows arranged in a regular pattern on both floors. The property is landscaped with small trees and shrubs, including a purple-leaved tree and a green-leaved bush, adding natural accents to the clean lines of the building. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a paved area and a small side extension, possibly a garage or covered entry. The windows are large and grid-like, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large grid windows, and minimalist landscaping featuring small trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, a purple-leaved tree, and a side extension.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting large grid windows and dense shrubbery along the back wall.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the flat roof, tan wall, and landscaping on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the entryway, windows, and a purple-leaved tree.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small paved approach, no porch or columns, flanked by landscaping.
